titleStmt.title: SII 15.43: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 43. (B.K. No. 23 of 1927-28.) RĀJŪR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying against the front wall of the temple of Hanumān.

This inscription which is indifferently engraved, refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalla and is dated Śaka 45869, Śrīmukha, Vaiśākha-paurṇimā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. This date is obviously wrong. The cyclic year Śrīmukha occurred in 1153-54 A.D. by which time Jagadēkamalla's reign had ended. The other details of the date also do not agree.

The record describes the excellence of Ācha-nṛipa and introduces his subordinate Jōga-gavuḍa of Rājūr, situated in Kisukāḍu Seventy. It registers a gift of land to the god Gavaṟēśvara, also called Jōgēśvara, by Jōga-gavuḍa and Aṟuvattokkalu. Chandrabhūshaṇadēva, the āchārya of the god Kalidēva, received the gift. Several other gifts made to the same deity are also mentioned. In South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI, Pt. I, No. 69, this inscription has been ascribed to Jagadēkamalla I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The language of the inscription is fautly.
div.p:
© namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhayā saṁbhuvē . namaḥ śivāya © © © © © gaṇanatha .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājanuṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsṛ
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī jagadēkamalladēva
ra vijeyarājyamuttharōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamana
caṁdṛrkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmamō
pajīvigaḷu kalyāṇapurada nelavīḍiniṁ sukhasaṁkathavinō[*da]diṁdire .
śrī kalidēvarācari caṁdrabhūśaṇadēvaru paḍeda dhārapūrvvaka
kāvaṁ saraṇene bhītiyanīvaṁ vaṁdimanadayiṣṭama mattaṁ
yēvanu yaṁbarī nṟipanaṁ kāvavanā� Ācanṛpanameniyise ba
duṁkuvannarumoḷarē . tṟiṇavaṁ kaccalu kāduṁ raṇadalu ma
ṟaṁta nṟipara gelduṁ triṇe(ṁ)yanaṁgati bhaktaṁ guṇanidhi Ācanripamū
rjjitatējaṁ . tatpadōpajīvitiṁ(taṁ)gaḷu vaṁdijanakaṁ rāgadiyavarka
vanene tyāgada kaṇigārdore jōgaṁgeṁdu pogaḷdu bhūmaṁḍaḷaṁ ĀnūnaThe letter da is written above the line.
yadiṁdaṁ . saṁtōsade prabhu jōgaṁ Anaṁntakalisukhadaliddamatthaṁ bṛṁ
tīlaide paramana Aciṁtyana śupratiyiṣṭa māḍāludyuktanu
mādaṁ . va . Aṁntu kuṁntaḷamadhyapradēsadoḷasava ra
maṇīya venisida kisūkāḍepṛta ṟoḷu Atisayavenisidāgara
rājuralli śukhasaṁkhathāṁ vinōdadiṁdara sakhavarśada 45869 neya śrī
mukhasaṁvatsarada vaiśa(śā)kha śuddha puṇṇami sōmavāradaṁdu vuttarāyaṇa
saṁkramupaḷada Abhijeya lagnadalu śrī jōgēśvaradēvara saṁpra
tiṣṭhitamāytu Atiṣayaveltēṁ . karasi Ayinūrbari
ge vistaradiṁ vīḷayamanittu paramaprabhu manōha
ramūrttige śrīgavaṟēśvaradēvareṁndarale caṁdrārkavaraṁḥ . Antu
taṁmma kulasvami śrī gavaṟēśvaradēvargge rājura A
ṟuvattho(tto)kkalu mukhyavāgi jōgagavuṁḍaṁ dēvara Aṁgabhōgajī
rnōdharake koṭṭa vriti jaṇabana kereṁ teṁka mattharu 4 chatṛgeya muṁja
geṟeya dāriṁ baḍagalu gramēsvaradēvara keIyiṁ teṁka maṁ
ttharu voṁdu 1 Aī(yi)nūrvvaru mukhyavāgi Ā staḷada gavaṟegaṁḍaruṁ
muṁmaridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ koṭṭa dhraṁ(dha)rmma caitrapavitradali vokkali
ge hāga voṭṭalugoḷaga hanage mānavatta soṁṭige yaṇne hoṁge
davasa vikreyakke Arevīsa maneya nevēsaṇa mūḍa sō
manathadēvara gaddheyi paḍuva teṁkamukhavāgi baṁda kai 48 teṁkapaḍuvamukhavāgibaṁda mēre
karaḍiya malayana maṁṭhediṁ baḍaga kai 34 paḍuva mūligavaneya heddāri mūḍa baḍaga
mukha baṁda kai 48 baḍaga kṣētrapāḷa mēre mūḍamukhavāgi baṁda kai 34 Ā nivēsaṇadalli
gāṇavoṁdu 1 sāsirvvaruṁ mūnūrvvaru koṭṭa Eleya hēṟiṁge vīsa 1
© śrī sōmanāthadēvariṁge tōṁṭa vuṁcageṟeyā dāriṁ baḍaga ma
ttha(tta)ru 2 gaddhe kalidēvara gaddeyiṁ teṁka nīṟuvagaliṁ paḍuva katthalēsvaradiṁ baḍaga
lu sōmanāthadēvariṁ mūḍa kaṁma 450 sāsirvvaruṁ mūnūrvvaruṁ koṭṭa Eleya
hēṟiṁge vīsa Ā tōṭake suṁkā paṁnnāya saṁmastaruṁ maṁnnaṇe .
Digital edition of SII 15.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
